component.name: Job Card
component.description: Primary list/detail surface for a single job: left accent rail, title + customer/date row, optional category chip, **Status pill** (`622:143`) in the header, and a four-column metrics footer (TIME, REV, MAT, NET). Auto layout end-to-end. Copy and metrics are instance/code-driven.

dimensions.width: 391 for Default, No job category, Empty State; **351** for **No Metrics** (`1286:816`) and **Header without card** (`1836:2829`).
dimensions.height: hugs content; **1px** top border on `job-card-metrics` when the metrics row follows the category chip (**Default**) or when there is no chip (**No job category**, **Empty State**).

figmaVariants.Property 1=Default: Node `661:2`. Category chip visible; example job + category + metrics. Header status is a **`Status pill`** instance (**Paid** / `622:142`) inside `job-card-status-pill`, not a duplicated frame.
figmaVariants.Property 1=No job category: Node `622:162`. Same as Default but **no** category chip (row removed; shorter height).
figmaVariants.Property 1=Empty State: Node `622:199`. No category chip; placeholder **Untitled Job**, meta **No Customer** only by default. Status is a **`Status pill`** component instance (**Not started** / `622:144`), not inline text. Metrics **0.0h** / **$0** / **-$0** / **$0**.
figmaVariants.Property 1=No Metrics: Node `1286:816`. Same as Default for title, metadata, status pill, and **category chip**; **no** TIME/REV/MAT/NET row or divider. Status uses **`Status pill`** instance **Paid** (`622:142`) under `job-card-status-pill`.
figmaVariants.Property 1=Header without card: Node `1836:2829`. **351** wide; **no** left accent rail; **transparent** shell (no white fill / stroke) with card shadow; title **Typography/Heading-H2** (24); optional category chip like **No Metrics**; **no** metrics row.

layoutSemantics.base: Figma **component set** `622:161` with property **Property 1** (`Default` | `No job category` | `Empty State` | `No Metrics` | `Header without card`). Code: `variant` **`withCategory`** | **`noCategory`** | **`emptyState`** | **`noMetrics`** | **`headerWithoutCard`**.
layoutSemantics.categoryVariant: `withCategory`, `noMetrics`, and `headerWithoutCard`: show category chip when `categoryLabel` is set. `noCategory` and `emptyState`: omit chip. `emptyState` applies default copy when props are omitted (see `codeProps`).
layoutSemantics.statusPill: Header uses the **`Status pill`** component (`622:143`) via `StatusPill` in code. Map `statusVariant` to pill kind (`success` → paid, `neutral` → not started) or pass `statusPillKind` for full lifecycle control.

regions.card: Outer frame: **Foundation/Surface/White** fill; **1px** stroke **Foundation/Border/Subtle** at **~10%** paint opacity (matches variable binding in file); corner **Radius/16**. Drop shadow **0 / 1 / 2 / 5%** black (local effect; same family as other cards).
regions.accentRail: 2px-wide vertical strip; **Brand/Primary** at **15%** paint opacity (matches reference frame `622:90`; `#D4572A`).
regions.header: Title: Typography/Title-H3. Metadata: Typography/Body. Status: **Status pill** (`Typography/LABEL`) — see `Status pill` spec and `tokens.colors`.
regions.category: Chip fill **Foundation/Text/Primary**; label **Typography/LABEL** + **Foundation/Background/Default** (warm off-white), not pure white—matches reference `622:90`.
regions.metrics: Typography/**Body-Bold** (14 SemiBold) for values. Labels: Typography/LABEL + **Foundation/Text/Muted**. Colors: **Foundation/Text/Primary** (TIME/REV), **Semantic/Status/Error/Text** (MAT — Figma binding), **Semantic/Status/Success/Text** or **Brand/Primary** (NET) per `netSentiment`.
regions.autoLayout: Root horizontal (accent + content stack); header row horizontal; status pill and category chip horizontal hug; metrics row horizontal with equal-grow columns; each metric column vertical; accent strip vertical fill on the cross axis.
regions.spacing: Root padding **Spacing/24** horizontal, **0** vertical. Inner **Container**: **Spacing/24** top + bottom, **Spacing/16** between header / category / metrics. Nested spacing uses **Spacing** tokens—see `spacingLayout`.

spacingLayout.contentPaddingVertical: Spacing/24 on inner **Container** (top + bottom); horizontal padding 0 on that frame (root supplies horizontal inset)
spacingLayout.sectionStackGap: Spacing/16 between header / category / metrics on inner **Container**
spacingLayout.titleHeadingGap: 0 on **Heading** frame (Spacing token; multi-line title still uses Title-H3 line wrapping)
spacingLayout.headingFrameMinHeight: **49px** min-height on **Heading** when `variant` is not `emptyState` or `headerWithoutCard` (single-line title alignment in Figma)
spacingLayout.metaRowWidth: **170px** wide (`max-width` **200** for Default / No Metrics); **170px** fixed for No job category / Empty State; **100%** for Header without card (`622:161` export).

tokens.collections: Figma variables are grouped as in the file: **Color Styles** (palette), **Spacing**, **Radius**, **Typography** (family/size/weight as string or float vars backing text styles). Prefer binding to those variables—not raw hex—in production components.

codeProps.title: Required when `variant` is not `emptyState`. For `emptyState`, defaults to **Untitled Job**. Use **Typography/Heading-H2** when `headerWithoutCard`.
codeProps.lastWorkedLabel: optional; for `emptyState` defaults to **empty** (meta line is only the customer default when no `lastWorkedLabel`).
codeProps.categoryLabel: optional; chip when `variant` is `withCategory` or `noMetrics` and label is non-empty.
codeProps.status: Required when `variant` is not `emptyState`. For `emptyState`, defaults to **NOT STARTED**.
codeProps.statusVariant: `success` | `neutral` — maps to `StatusPill` kind when `statusPillKind` omitted. `emptyState` defaults to **neutral**.
codeProps.timeHours: For `emptyState` defaults to **0.0h**. Ignored visually when `variant` is `noMetrics`.
codeProps.onPress: optional callback when the card is pressed

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Job Card (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.heading: job-card-heading

notes: 2026-03-28: Figma **component set** `622:161` with three variants; master Default remains `661:2`.
2026-04-07: Figma **No Metrics** variant (`1286:816`): code `noMetrics` — category + header like Default, metrics row omitted.
2026-04-10: Renamed structural wrappers to kebab-case `job-card-*` and mirrored them with `data-name` hooks in TSX.
2026-04-11: `COMPONENT_SET` vertical auto layout (16px gap). `clipsContent` cleared on all layers whose names start with `job-card`. Structural naming already aligned; TSX unchanged aside from docs.
MAT value color synced from Figma: **Brand/Accent** (`#C44B2B`); Empty State status uses **`Status pill`** instance (Not started).
Root **Spacing/24** horizontal; inner **Container** **Spacing/24** vertical + **Spacing/16** section gaps.
Spacing tokens on nested frames: **Heading** gap **0**, **Meta row** pad **0**; metrics row **Spacing/16** top inset, **Spacing/32** column gap.
Header status uses **`Status pill`** (`622:143`) + semantic tokens in `colors.json`. Accent stripe: **Brand/Primary** @ **15%** paint opacity.
Bind fills and strokes to variables via the file’s Color Styles collection; avoid raw hex on production components.
Paused/on-hold styling for **Status pill** uses **Semantic/Status/Paused/BG** + **Semantic/Status/Paused/Text** in `colors.json`.

2026-04-08: **Default** (`661:2`) and **No Metrics** (`1286:816`) — replaced hand-built `Status pill` frames + `Status label` text with **`Status pill`** component instances (`622:142` Paid) under `job-card-status-pill`. **No job category** (`622:162`) and **Empty State** (`622:199`) were already instances (`622:153`, `622:144`). Component set `622:161` verified vertical stack 16px; `clipsContent` false on `job-card-*` frames.
2026-04-11: Figma sync — `maxWidth` **391** vs **351** (`noMetrics`); `job-card-metrics` **border-top** when category chip present (**Default**).

2026-04-11 (later): New **Header without card** (`variant` `headerWithoutCard`): no accent rail, transparent shell + shadow, **351** max width, **Heading-H2** title; MAT value **Semantic/Status/Error/Text**; metrics **border-top** also for **noCategory** / **emptyState**; empty-state meta **No Customer** only by default.

2026-04-11 (sync): Figma — `job-card-heading` **minHeight 49** (except empty + header-without-card); `job-card-meta-row` width **170** / **maxWidth 200** (Default + No Metrics) vs **170** (No category + Empty) vs **100%** (Header without card); **nowrap** on empty-state meta.
